sizing_rule.note: Position size constrained such that maximum loss per trade equals the option debit paid (premium at entry). This caps downside to a fixed, known amount per trade, eliminating certain ruin over infinite trading periods. Operationally: size position so that (shares × debit per contract) = max acceptable loss per trade.

source_rule_text: Cap maximum loss per trade by trading options initiated at a debit to eliminate certain ruin when trading for infinitely long periods
